data.name: 異世界淫亂後宮物語
data.detailed_description:
在一個平凡的晚上,某某正在做一召喚儀式... 我們的“英雄”被一位妖魔皇后召喚到她的世界並至命他為她的“地牢獄長” 。獄長的職責就是幫女王把所有的女英雄們抓進她的地牢。妖魔皇后持有可以摧毀世界的魔法讓她每天折磨著人類。這麼強大的妖怪為什麼需要一位獄長呢？

不久前地牢受到女英雄們的襲擊，由公主騎士Risette領隊。她的嚴肅和賢德讓她拔起一把神聖的劍，足以消滅妖魔皇后。Risette的地位和榮譽促使她去保護她的國家並攻擊邪惡的女玩。跟著Risette是她的老師，Aina，全國最厲害的劍士。雖然Aina不能使用任何的魔法，她的體格訓練卻給予她最強大的體質。Suzuka是來自東部的聖女， 她得知Risette的聲譽和企圖，足以感動到她並讓她參與Risette的小隊。Suzuka可以讓神靈們給予所有人神聖的祝福。Ulysses，一位帶有魔法能力的醫療祭司，她的能力足以讓外人當作女神崇拜。

見証獄長的猖狂和變態策略和陷阱，並看看這些英雄們進入地牢后的命運。

特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。

Deviant Dungeon是一款英文化VN，原裝游戲是由日本制作室Norn/Miel制作。我們在櫻桃吻吻將日本VN帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這游戲裡。

data.short_description: 被邪惡女皇召喚到一個只有女人的異世界成為地牢獄長！你的使命是抓捕所有的女英雄們，把她們肆意爆射... 疾風怒濤一般的異世界歡樂向后宮物語，即將展開！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

  • 處理器: Intel Core m3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible

  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:

  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:

  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 MB 可用空間

data.name: Deviant Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
An average night playing video games except for a sudden slip, bump and... magic summoning ritual? Our "hero" finds himself in another world at the behest of a haughty Demon Queen and is appointed her new "Dungeon Master" to fortify her dungeon against all those who would dare enter. The Demon Queen wields world-ending magical powers and obviously has made a few enemies as she whimsically torments humanity, hopefully it is clear why she would need a dungeon to ward off any would be do-gooders who would try to stop her.

Quickly you find the dungeon is under attack by the worlds strongest heroines, led by the Princess Knight Risette. She is a serious woman and, thanks to her virtuous nature, was chosen to wield a holy sword which is key to defeating the Demon Queen. Risette feels she is honor-bound to defend her kingdom from the Demon Queens' forces and leads the charge into the dungeon. Accompanying Risette is her sword-teacher Aina, she is considered the greatest warrior in the realm. While Aina has no talent for stuff like magic she has rigorously trained her body so that she is unmatched in terms of physical strength. Suzuka is a shrine maiden from an eastern kingdom. Touched by Risette's resolve to defend the world from the threat of the Demon Queen she came to aid Risette on her quest. Suzuka communes with the gods who bestow herself and her allies with powerful blessings. Finally, Ulysses the High Priestess of Healing. She has vast magical knowledge and her limitless kindness leads some people to believe she is a goddess herself.

Witness the depraved tactics and perverted traps these brave heroes are subjected to by the Demon Queen's newest dungeon master. Such is the fate of all those who dare enter the Devious Dungeon.

Features:
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections

Deviant Dungeon is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Summoned into a world of only women, and tasked by the Demon Queen to fortify her dungeon against the world's strongest heroines. Use perverted traps to capture them one and a time, and force them to submit. Build a mighty harem and who knows, it might bring the Demon Queen to her knees...
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
